summary.en: Lithium battery and power bank suppliers entering Chile should map the product to NCh-adopted IEC 62133 safety expectations, including abuse and protection performance for lithium cells and packs, because Chilean market review has been moving toward standards-based safety evidence for import.
summary.zh: 向智利投放的锂电池/移动电源应将产品映射到INN NCh采用的IEC 62133安全要求，包括电芯和电池组的过充过热保护、异常工况下性能等，因为智利市场审查逐步要求按标准化安全证据支持进口。
summary.zht: 向智利投放的鋰電池/行動電源應將產品對應到INN NCh採用的IEC 62133安全要求，包括電芯和電池組的過充過熱保護、異常工況下性能等，因為智利市場審查逐步要求按標準化安全證據支持進口。

standards_or_laws: INN NCh-aligned battery safety standards based on IEC 62133
SEC electrical product safety handling rules for lithium battery-containing devices
Industry practice references for lithium battery safety test dossiers linked to IEC criteria

summary.en: China uses GB 31241 and related GB/GB T safety standards for lithium battery construction and testing. Those are valid Chinese baselines, but they are not a full substitute for Chile-adapted NCh expectations under SEC review.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 31241及相关GB/GBT安全标准作为锂电池设计与测试基线，这些是中国有效基线，但在SEC审查下不能完全替代智利NCh对应要求。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 31241及相關GB/GBT安全標準作為鋰電池設計與測試基線，這些是中國有效基線，但在SEC審查下不能完全替代智利NCh對應要求。

standards_or_laws: GB / GB T lithium-cell and battery testing standards
CCC electrical safety records used for China compliance

gap.en: Chinese reports are helpful but may not be accepted as-is for Chilean battery-safety review. A Chile-facing file should identify the exact battery chemistry, capacity band, cell format, and safety test scope, and then evidence compatibility with NCh/IEC 62133 expectations.
gap.zh: 中国报告可作为参考，但在智利电池安全审查中通常不能直接沿用。需建立面向智利的文件，明确化学体系、容量段、单体形式、测试范围，再与NCh/IEC 62133对应要求逐项对接。
gap.zht: 中國報告可作為參考，但在智利電池安全審查中通常不能直接沿用。需建立面向智利的文件，明確化學體系、容量段、單體形式、測試範圍，再與NCh/IEC 62133對應要求逐項對接。

mandatory_status.target: Typically mandatory where lithium battery cells and packs are in scope of SEC-administrable electrical product safety expectations.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/GB T safety testing is mandatory or expected in China for domestic compliance, but not treated as Chile approval.

source.publisher: Government of Chile portal (linking to INN/SEC related standards context)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use Chinese GB/GB T test results as baseline material, then reframe into Chile-targeted product documentation for NCh/IEC alignment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将中国GB/GBT测试结果作为底稿，再转化为面向智利市场、以NCh/IEC对齐为核心的技术文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將中國GB/GBT測試結果作為底稿，再轉化為面向智利市場、以NCh/IEC對齊為核心的技術文件。
